title: The Best Way to Protect Your Village in Minecraft

scenes.clipper_notes: For most of this video, it'll be in a superflat world generated with structures. For this, show my character walking towards the camera infront of the village that will be used later.
Show, during night time, a bunch of mobs attacking the village from #1
Show my character in some iron armor like they're playing in survival, and they walk up to a crafting table using TrackEntity and open the crafting table like they're about to craft some torches.

scenes.script_line: just placing a bunch of torches down
scenes.clipper_notes: Show timelapse of my character running around the entire village placing torches down like someone would in a survival world to stop mobs from spawning
Show TrackEntity of infront of a zombie as they're walking into the village, like they made it past the torches
Show medium-far camera distance of the same thing from #5, just showing that they've made it despite there's torches on the ground around them
Show one of the villagers walking out of a house (night time again)
Show that villager (but you morphed as a villager) sprinting towards a bunch of mobs during night
Show Bart Simpson standing near the village
This will be a 3 block wide moat around the village. For this one though, show my character "digging the moat", like the initial portion of it (not timelapse)
Show further away angle of the fully dug moat around the entire village
Show Bart Simpson standing at the edge of the trench holding a shovel like they just finished.
Show a spider climbing the wall, if you can't get this naturally you can use morph mod
Show a villager at the bottom of the moat like they fell in
Show my player pushing a villager down into the ditch, like revealing the one from #14 was actually mischievously pushed in
Show my character walking / bobbing (since in water) towards the camera from at the bottom of the trench next to the villager that fell in
Show my player building the wooden wall at the edge of the inside of the moat
Show further away shot of the entire wooden wall built

Show close camera to the outside of the wall and the overhang appears in. What I mean by overhang is 1 block ring that extends around so the wall isn't just straight up, stopping spiders from being able to climb straight up
Show a spider trying to climb it but they fail since they can't make it past
For this one, they'll be a little gate at one of the walls, with a small bridge over the 3 block moat. For this scene, just show TrackEntity of my player walking to the bridge from inside the village
Show further away shot of my player walking over the bridge to leave the village
Show my player walking towards the camera infront of the bridge from #22
Show my player fighting a raid from ontop of the wall, like proving its functional
Show a further away / cinematic shot of the wooden fort
Show my player standing on the wall looking at the camera
Show bird's eye view from far away showing that the wooden fort is small compared to surroundings
Show a shot of a medieval city build, like the idea being this one has lots of nice buildings and is more developed

scenes.script_line: So once you become established in your world
scenes.clipper_notes: Show my player walking up to an armor stand with enchanted diamond armor and a weapon and equipping it

The idea is that the player is giving command of the wooden fort to their dog, so there will be a simple throne in the wooden fort and one of those red carpets. This scene will just be my player walking towards the throne on the red carpet and "bowing" by shifting and looking down
Show different angle revealing that the dog is sitting in the throne
Show first person feeding dog steak with the heart emojis
Show my player riding a horse (by now in full enchanted diamond armor) on a horse with diamond armor with track entity like they're traveling to a new location.
Show further away angle of my player dismounting the horse at a new village like they're about to build it at this one
Show a bunch of stone bricks in a chest like thats what going to be used for this one
Show cinematic shot of this time its built out of stone bricks and looks higher quality. Try and make it look cooler like maybe with a cool gate, maybe a tower, etc.
Show a flag built out of wool blocks on the stone fortress of the colors of KnavishMantis minecraft skin
Show inside the chest of the different wool colors used for flag in #37
Show my minecraft character standing under the flag like showing it corresponds to the color
